query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: Stacks of books, magazines, and loose papers sit on a surface next to plastic shopping bags in a corner of a room. Behind the items, a large decorative tray with painted fruit and foliage rests against a wood-paneled wall beneath a window with closed horizontal blinds.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Captured with amateur snapshot energy, a corner of a room appears in neglected disarray under a sickly orange cast, showing stacks of books, magazines, and loose papers beside plastic shopping bags in a scene of entropy. Behind the items, a large decorative tray with painted fruit and foliage rests against a wood-paneled wall beneath a window with closed horizontal blinds.
